name: the bar at Rosewood Sand Hill
vibe: where Series A whispers turn into wires; everyone is pretending not to overhear

name: Tartine Bakery in the Mission
vibe: soft morning light, $9 morning bun, three pitch decks open at adjacent tables

name: the YC batch house in Mountain View
vibe: fluorescent lights, whiteboards covered in crossed-out TAM numbers, someone is always crying in the bathroom

name: Philz Coffee on 24th and Mission
vibe: dollar bills tipped on the counter, two AI cofounders breaking up at the corner table

name: the southbound Caltrain platform at 4th & King
vibe: the 7:42am pilgrimage; nobody makes eye contact; everyone has the same backpack

name: the international terminal at SFO
vibe: the airport where every founder has either landed reborn or left defeated; United Polaris lounge optional

name: the Battery, members-only
vibe: exposed brick, $24 cocktails, the kind of room where the deal closes before the appetizers arrive

name: Dolores Park on a 70-degree Sunday
vibe: competing picnics of seed-stage founders; someone is selling THC gummies; the 24-year-old with $2M ARR is shirtless

name: Sightglass Coffee in SoMa
vibe: industrial ceiling, third-wave espresso, two-person standups happening at every other table

name: Buena Vista Cafe at Ghirardelli
vibe: Irish coffee, ironic founder destination; you came here to feel like a tourist in your own city

name: Manny's in the Mission
vibe: political-civic cafe-bar where founders cosplay as policy wonks and a city-supervisor staffer is always at the next table

name: Ritual Coffee on Valencia
vibe: the original third-wave pulpit; a hardware founder is sketching on a napkin and refusing to make eye contact with their cofounder

name: Blue Bottle in Hayes Valley
vibe: minimalist cube of guilt where pre-seed founders meet ex-Stripe PMs to 'just catch up'

name: Founders Inc on the Marina
vibe: a converted pier with a yacht out back; pitch decks open on every couch, somebody's robot dog is loose

name: AGI House in Hillsborough
vibe: hacker-house mansion where every weekend is a hackathon and every demo claims to be sentient

name: Trick Dog in the Mission
vibe: menus printed like pamphlets; where a Series B implodes over the third mezcal cocktail and someone live-tweets it

name: the Crissy Field running path
vibe: golden-hour cardio for VCs who do their best thinking at 7-minute miles; deals get verbally confirmed near the Warming Hut

name: Zeitgeist beer garden
vibe: the punishment bar; where you go after the term sheet falls through to drink a Pabst with people who don't know what an SAFE is

name: the Ferry Building on a Saturday
vibe: farmers-market cosplay for founders pretending to have a personal life; a journalist is always at Acme Bread
